name: Counselling for Schools (School Counsellor)
student_summary: Be the trusted adult every school needs.
overview: Be the trusted adult every school needs. Counselling for Schools (School Counsellor) sits in the Psychology family of Social Impact, Psychology & Community Services. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You feel fulfilled when your work directly helps someone
who_should_avoid: You want a laptop-anywhere lifestyle — this work happens in person
daily_responsibilities: Apply student counselling to real problems
Collaborate with your team using crisis response
Keep improving at parent-teacher collaboration — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Hospitals, clinics and care settings — human contact all day
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Psychology foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Location-bound work; postings and relocation are part of the deal
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Counselling for Schools (School Counsellor) is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of crisis response
projects: Beginner: explore student counselling with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Counselling tools
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.

faqs: What does Counselling for Schools (School Counsellor) pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹10 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Psychology, Education. Typical degrees: B.A./M.A. Psychology + school counselling certification. Alternatives exist: any degree + msw.
Will AI take over this career?

AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Counselling for Schools (School Counsellor) evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Counselling for Schools (School Counsellor) is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
